parameters.jsCode:
const b = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody;
return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Event created!', event: { title: b.title, start: b.start, end: b.end, location: b.location || null, calendar: $('Build Create').first().json.calendarName } } }];

const b = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody;
return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Event updated!', event: { uid: b.eventUid, title: b.title || null, sequence: $('Build Update').first().json.sequence } } }];

const b = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody;
return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Event deleted!', eventUid: b.eventUid } }];

const action = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody?.action || 'unknown';
return [{ json: { success: false, message: `Invalid action: ${action}. Use fetch, create, update, or delete.` } }];
